title: Type 2 diabetes follow-up (synthetic SOAP note)
text: Patient A is a 64-year-old male with a history of type 2 diabetes mellitus. Currently taking aspirin 81mg daily and metformin 500mg twice daily. Plan: continue current regimen, recheck HbA1c in 3 months.
